<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 68025 => 'Sonsorol State and Hatohobei State', 68027 => 'Angaur State', 6803 => 'Peleliu State', 68048 => 'Koror State', 68053 => 'Ngatpang State', 68054 => 'Aimeliik State', 68058 => 'Airai State', 680622 => 'Ngchesar State', 68065 => 'Melekeok State', 68067 => 'Ngiwal State', 68073 => 'Ngaremlengui State', 68074 => 'Ngardmau State', 68082 => 'Ngaraard State', 68085 => 'Ngarchelong State', 68087 => 'Kayangel State', ];
